title: Pentalophus longiflorus
preparations: Pentalophus longiflorus, also known as the Chalice Vine, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Herbal preparations of this plant are primarily used for their purported antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The extracts are often used topically to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. In some cultures, the plant is used to make teas and infusions that are believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system. However, the effectiveness and safety of these herbal preparations are not well documented and should be used with caution.
